articles.author: Omkar Khandekar
articles.title: India's Gen Z 'Cockroach People's Party' started as satire but is serious about change - NPR
articles.description: They call themselves the "cockroaches" and they're on the march — demanding action against corruption, amid a shortage of opportunities for young people in India.
articles.content: NEW DELHI Thousands of protesters marched to India's Parliament on Monday, facing a police crackdown as the demonstrators demanded the resignation of the country's education minister, in one of the b… [+10903 chars]
